description: Style Note There is nothing a girl loves more than sparkling jewellery in all shapes and sizes. However, the bigger and shinier, the better! We bring to you jewellery from fabindia. Now find your pick and pair it up with fancy kurta's from Fabindia. Product Description Silver latch back earring that has a white stone embellishment Material and Care Silver Wipe with dry cloth Size  Length: 2.5 mm
